findings.description: The source explicitly states that when bySingleValue is true (default) and the value for the name attribute is an array or collection, the tag returns the first element ('先頭の要素を返す'). The knowledge file only says '単一値として取得' without specifying this concrete behavior. This is decision-necessary information because a developer relying on default behavior with an array would silently receive only the first element.
findings.source_evidence: 「単一値での値取得では、name属性に対応する値が配列やコレクションの場合に先頭の要素を返す。」
